project.name: agent-forge
project.description: Skill distribution repo for Cursor and Claude Code. This harness manages the multi-agent upgrade of the development-harness skill that lives inside this repo (dogfood).

definition_of_done: Unit tests for the unit's changes pass

notes._versioning_preference: break_on_schema_bump=true (user explicitly preferred clean code over back-compat). PHASE_001 introduces the execution_mode.versioning.break_on_schema_bump config field; once that field exists, persist it as true.
notes._parallelism_preference: parallelism.enabled=false during this bootstrap (the feature doesn't exist yet — PHASE_007 introduces it). After PHASE_007 lands, user may flip to true for the remaining phases.
notes._edit_target: All skill edits land in skills/development-harness/**. The scripts under .harness/scripts/ are a frozen copy made at bootstrap time.
